channel.title: incessant intriacies of an internet dragon
channel.description: Talk about tech, furries, and chatter about the day-to-day of an overcaffinated student. Not really that incessant, actually.

item.title: New Years Resolutions
item.author: Doraii
item.description: Let's talk about what I plan to accomplish this year.

content:encoded.p: So, a new year has come again and my goals weren't achieved. Again...

br.p: Y'know what? Fuck this shit, I'll actually commit to my resolutions this year¹
But I've been thinking... What are my new years resolutions? Well, after some thinking, I've come up with an oddly lenient list:

ul.li: Loose at least a bit of weight and eat healthier
Exploring new things a bit, from clothing choices to foods

br.p: I probably would have put more if I didn't realize I had to be plausible as to not get overwhelmed, because I've seen enough resolutions like

br.blockquote: For 2025, I want to own 269 Lamborghinis and become the CEO of uhhh Xbox or something I don't fuckin' know

br.p: I'm sorry to say to any aspiring Xbox CEOs butttt... It's kind of a hard wish, innit? Some think that you can just do it, but the complications are more immense than the Milky Way. Ok, maybe not that immense, but you get my drift.
But anyways, I hope I can accomplish my goals. It's a long journey ahead, but perserverance can get me through a bit of it at least.
¹ Hopefully, at least. I can at least wish, yeah?
